_comment: The Familiar skills library. This lists every skill your Familiar has, both the always-on active set and the wider catalogue it can pull from on demand. The skill-library skill reads this file to show you the library and to add or remove skills. Each entry: name (matches the folder under .claude/skills or library/skills), category, summary (one line), triggers (phrases that fire it), location (active = auto-loaded now, library = pullable). Keep location honest: it must match where the folder actually lives.

skills.name: connector-setup
skills.summary: Walk your person through connecting Gmail, Calendar, and Drive on claude.ai.

skills.name: daily-brief
skills.summary: Open the day with one tight brief of what matters: board, calendar, inbox.

skills.name: email-triage
skills.summary: Sort the inbox into needs-them, drafted, and noise, never sending unapproved.

skills.name: voice-capture
skills.summary: Collect writing samples and build a working voice profile so you sound like them.

skills.name: weekly-review
skills.summary: Sweep the board weekly, name what moved and what stalled, set next week.

skills.name: self-improve
skills.summary: Capture friction and codify the fix so the same problem does not repeat.

skills.name: pattern-codify
skills.summary: File a durable rule the moment your person states one.

skills.name: status-board-update
skills.summary: Maintain status-board.md as the single source of truth for active work.

skills.name: pack-update
skills.summary: Pull upstream pack improvements safely, never touching your person's files.

skills.name: cdp-usage
skills.summary: Drive Chrome for browser-only surfaces in their signed-in session.

skills.name: give-feedback
skills.summary: Pass a real feature request or bug to the EcodiaOS team when you cannot solve it.

skills.name: skill-library
skills.summary: Browse the wider skills library and add or remove skills on demand.

skills.name: troubleshoot
skills.summary: Systematic routine to route around a blocker instead of giving up or escalating early.

skills.name: skill-creator
skills.summary: Build a new skill and its keyword trigger for a repeatable workflow, named so a pull keeps it.
triggers: set this up so you can do it again

skills.name: meeting-prep
skills.summary: Build a tight prep pack before a meeting: who, what, history, three things to have ready.

skills.name: calendar-triage
skills.summary: Sweep the calendar for clashes, gaps, back-to-backs, and missing links.

skills.name: inbox-zero
skills.summary: Drive a full inbox backlog down to zero in one focused session.

skills.name: contact-followup
skills.summary: Track who owes a reply and chase quiet threads at the right moment.

skills.name: intro-draft
skills.summary: Draft a warm double-opt-in introduction between two people they know.

skills.name: doc-draft
skills.summary: Draft a memo, one-pager, or letter from a short brief in their voice.

skills.name: proposal-draft
skills.summary: Draft a client proposal or quote: scope, deliverables, timeline, price, terms.

skills.name: note-summarize
skills.summary: Turn raw notes or a transcript into decisions and actions, captured to the right place.

skills.name: research-brief
skills.summary: Research a topic, person, or company and return a tight cited brief.

skills.name: call-prep
skills.summary: Prep a phone or video call with a short script: goal, points, objections, close.

skills.name: invoice-chase
skills.summary: Track what they are owed and chase overdue invoices at the right cadence.

skills.name: expense-capture
skills.summary: Turn receipts and transactions into a clean categorised expense record.

skills.name: weekly-plan
skills.summary: Build the week ahead: the few things that matter mapped against real capacity.

skills.name: travel-plan
skills.summary: Plan a trip end to end: flights, stays, transport, itinerary, calendar holds.

skills.name: content-repurpose
skills.summary: Turn one finished piece into several formats in their voice, ready to schedule.

skills.name: newsletter-draft
skills.summary: Draft a newsletter issue from recent activity: subject options, structure, body.

skills.name: web-watch
skills.summary: Watch a page, search, or feed for a change and tell them when it moves.

skills.name: form-fill
skills.summary: Fill a web form or application from what they gave you, shown for a final check.

skills.name: crm-update
skills.summary: Keep contacts and deal records current: log calls, update stages, add contacts.
